instruction: Acting as a climate change mitigation brainstorming session leader, generate a list of 5 innovative, yet feasible, solutions that combine technology and community engagement to reduce carbon footprint in densely populated urban areas, within the next 5 years.
output: Integrate AI-powered smart grids with citizen-led energy harvesting initiatives, implement vertical farming with community workshops, deploy electric vehicle sharing systems with incentivized carpooling apps, create urban algae farms for CO2 absorption, and establish blockchain-based carbon credit systems for individuals and businesses.

instruction: क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग में 'स्केलेबिलिटी' का क्या अर्थ होता है? अपने उत्तर में इसके लाभों का भी उल्लेख करें।
output: क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग में स्केलेबिलिटी का अर्थ है संसाधनों (जैसे भंडारण, प्रसंस्करण शक्ति) को आवश्यकतानुसार तेजी से बढ़ाने या कम करने की क्षमता। इसके लाभ हैं: १) प्रतिक्रिया समय में सुधार, २) लागत बचत (केवल उपयोग किए गए संसाधनों का भुगतान), और ३) व्यवसाय विकास के साथ आसान अनुकूलन।

instruction: Mujhe ek lambi article dijiye jo kehta hai ki Artificial Intelligence (AI) ke badwaane ka kya prabhav hai vyavsayik kshetron mein, jaise ki manufacturing, healthcare aur finance. Maine us article ko nahi padha hai, lekin mujhe uski ek choti summary chahiye jo angrezi mein ho, lekin thoda Hinglish style mein bhi mil jaye (Roman script mein). Summary mein AI ke vikas, uske pramukh anuprayog aur kuchh chunautiyan bhi shamil honi chahiye.
output: AI ne manufacturing mein automation badhaya, healthcare mein smart diagnostics di, aur finance mein AI-powered trading platforms banaye. AI ka vikas neural networks aur machine learning se mila. Pramukh anuprayog: Chatbots, Virtual Assistants, Predictive Analytics. Chunautiyan: Job displacement, Data privacy concerns, aur bias in AI systems.

instruction: Imagine you are a cricket commentator for Star Sports Hindi. Describe, in Hinglish (Roman), the excitement of Rashid Khan taking a stunning catch in the outfield to dismiss Virat Kohli, using at least 3 Hindi words for emotions (e.g., रोमांच, उत्साह, खुशी) and mention the stadium (Wankhede, Mumbai). Keep it under 200 characters.
output: Wankhede Stadium mein toh #RashidKhan ne #ViratKohli ko nikal ke ROMANCH utha diya! Uska stunning catch dekhkar crowd mein UTSAH aur KHUSHI ka jhndata hua! Commentry box mein hum bhi jeet ke SAMMAN se bhare hue! #CricketFever #MumbaiMagic

instruction: Aapko ek vichaar dene wala hai ki kuch Bollywood filmein jinko 2010 se 2020 ke beech release kiya gaya tha, unka naam aapko angrezi mein likhna hai. Yadi film ka naam shuruat mein 'A' se hota hai, to uska sahi vaachanika chayan karna hai (The/ A/ An). Udaharan ke liye, 'Aamir Khan ki film Aamir 2008 mein release hui thi' - yahaan 'Aamir' ke liye 'A' ka upyog karen. Aapko kuch filmein deni hain aur unhe angrezi mein sahi roop se likhna hai.
output: Filmein hain: The Awara Paagal Deewana (2012), A Wednesday! (2008), Ankhon Dekhi (2014), The Dirty Picture (2011), Airlift (2016)

instruction: Classify the following statement about the Indian economy as either 'Positive', 'Negative', or 'Neutral': "India's GDP growth rate is expected to surpass 7% in the next fiscal year, driven by manufacturing and service sectors."
output: Positive

instruction: A student scored 85% in Mathematics, 90% in Science, and 78% in English in their semester exams. Which subject did the student perform the best in, and what was the percentage?
output: The student performed best in Science with 90%.

instruction: रमजान के महीने का महत्व समझाएं और हिंदी में इसका एक पारंपरिक फेस्टिवल के रूप में वर्णन करें (शिरकत करने वाले लोगों की संख्या और प्रमुख गतिविधियों का उल्लेख करें)
output: रमजान इस्लामी कलेंडर का नौवां महीना है, जो मुसलमानों के लिए तेजस्वी उपवास (सौम या रोजा) का समय है। भारत में लाखों लोग इस महीने में पूरे दिन उपवास रखते हैं और रात में इफ्तार के साथ ताजा खाद्य पदार्थों से अपना उपवास खत्म करते हैं। ईद-उल-फितर, जिसे छोटी ईद भी कहा जाता है, रमजान के पूरे होने के बाद मनाई जाती है। यह त्योहार अक्सर अप्रैल या मई में आता है। देशभर में मस्जिदों में विशेष नमाजें पढ़ी जाती हैं और लोग परिवार व दोस्तों के साथ मिलकर यह दिन मनाते हैं।

instruction: Aapko yeh English article ka ek paragraph mila hai. Aapko isko Hinglish (Roman script mein) mein translate karna hai, jahaan aapko machine learning ke technical terms angrezi mein rakhne honge. Paragraph yeh hai: 'Machine learning is a subset of Artificial Intelligence that enables systems to learn from data and improve their performance over time.'
output: Machine learning ek Artificial Intelligence ka subset hai, jo system ko data se sikhne aur samay ke saath apni performance sudharne ki capacity deta hai.

instruction: Summarize the following article about the latest advancements in quantum computing into a 2-sentence summary, highlighting the key breakthrough and its potential impact on data security: [Article Excerpt] 'Researchers at IBM have achieved a major breakthrough in quantum computing, successfully demonstrating a quantum processor with a record-breaking low error rate of 0.1%. This development is poised to significantly enhance the security of online transactions and data storage by enabling unbreakable quantum encryption methods.'
output: IBM's new quantum processor boasts a 0.1% error rate, a landmark in the field. This breakthrough promises to revolutionize data security with virtually unbreakable quantum encryption.

instruction: Correct the grammatical errors in the following sentence related to data science: 'The dataset are being processed by the data scientist team now.'
output: The dataset is being processed by the data science team now.

instruction: Translate the given machine learning concept from English to Spanish, maintaining technical accuracy. Input: 'The model achieved high accuracy through ensemble learning techniques, combining decision trees and random forest algorithms.'
output: El modelo logró alta precisión a través de técnicas de aprendizaje ensemble, combinando árboles de decisión y algoritmos de bosque aleatorio.

instruction:
Ek startup ka description diya hai. Aapko decide karna hai ki ye startup kaunse category me aata hai: E-commerce, Fintech, EduTech, aur HealthTech. Description padhkar category guess karo. 

Startup Description: 'Humne ek platform banaya hai jaha par log apne local teachers se online classes le sakte hai, aur hum fees ka 10% scholarship ke roop me donate karte hai local schools ko.'
output: EduTech

instruction: Ek article hai jo kehta hai: 'AI ko train karne ke liye bahut saare data ki zarurat hoti hai. Isliye, researchers ne data generation ke liye AI ko use karna shuru kiya.' Aapko is article ke maudye ko 2-3 line mein summarize karna hai, Hinglish (Roman) mein.
output: AI training ke liye vaste data ki zarurat ko poora karne ke liye researchers ne data generate karne ke liye bhi AI ka upyog shuru kiya hai.

instruction: Mujhe bataye ki cloud computing mein IaaS, PaaS, aur SaaS ki kya maaniyata hai? Yeh sab kis tarah se alag hain?
output: IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) mein hardware (server, storage, network) pradaan kiya jaata hai. PaaS (Platform as a Service) mein software development ke liye pura platform (tools, libraries, infrastructure) diya jaata hai. SaaS (Software as a Service) mein pre-built software applications Online pradaan kiye jaate hain, jaise Google Docs ya Salesforce.

instruction: वायुमंडलीय परिवर्तन (क्लाइमेट चेंज) के प्रभावों को कम करने के लिए 5 व्यावहारिक व्यक्तिगत कार्यों की सूची बनाएं जिन्हें आम आदमी अपने दैनिक जीवन में लागू कर सके।
output: वैयक्तिक स्तर पर जलवायु परिवर्तन को कम करने के लिए पांच महत्वपूर्ण कदम हैं: प्लास्टिक का उपयोग कम करें, सार्वजनिक परिवहन का उपयोग करें, ऊर्जा की बचत करें, वृक्षारोपण करें और इलेक्ट्रॉनिक उपकरणों का सही तरीके से विकिपीड़िया करें।

instruction: Aapne ek naya healthcare startup ki shuruaat ki hai India mein. Aapko pehla saal mein kis-kis cheezon par dhyan dena chahiye taaki aapka venture safal ho sakta hai? (You have started a new healthcare startup in India. What are the key things you should focus on in the first year for your venture to be successful?)
output: Pehle saal mein, humein patient data ka sahi management, affordable treatment ke options, rural area mein awareness campaigns, qualified doctor-nurse ki recruitment, aur government schemes (AYUSHMAN BHARAT jaise) se partnership banane par dhyan dena chahiye. E-connectivity via telemedicine bhi ek important aspect hai.

instruction: एक नियमित कार्यालय की तुलना में दूरस्थ कार्य के लिए एक दिन की योजना बनाएं, जिसमें उत्पादकता बढ़ाने और व्यक्तिगत समय को संतुलित करने के लिए विशिष्ट समय आवंटन शामिल हों।
output:
सुबह ८:०० - ९:००: व्यायाम और स्वस्थ ब्रेकफास्ट
९:०० - १२:००: प्राथमिक परियोजना पर काम
१२:०० - १:००: दोपहर का भोजन और आराम
१:०० - ३:००: द्वितीय परियोजना पर काम
३:०० - ३:३०: चाय का ब्रेक और छोटा वॉक
३:३० - ५:३०: टीम मीटिंग और लपटॉप से जुड़ी कार्य
५:३० - ६:३०: व्यक्तिगत विकास (ऑनलाइन कोर्स)
६:३० - ७:३०: व्यक्तिगत समय (परिवार/मित्रों से मिलना)
७:३० - ८:३०: रात का भोजन
८:३० - ९:३०: दिन की समीक्षा और अगले दिन की योजना
९:३०: नींद के लिए तैयारी

instruction: Classify the following statement related to the Indian economy as either 'Positive', 'Negative', or 'Neutral': "India's GDP growth rate has consistently surpassed that of China over the past three years, attracting increased foreign investment."
output: Positive

instruction: Imagine you are a cricket commentator. Describe the electric atmosphere at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai as India faces off against Australia in a high-stakes World Cup semi-final, with India batting second and needing 20 runs off the last 2 overs to win.
output: AND WELCOME BACK TO WANKHEDE, WHERE THE ATMOSPHERE IS ABSOLUTELY ELECTRIC! The crowd of over 40,000 is on the edge of their seats as India chases down a daunting target against arch-rivals Australia in this pivotal World Cup semi-final! We're down to the wire here - 2 overs left, 20 runs needed, and the Indian batsmen, Sharma and Kohli, are looking focused at the crease. Every run is met with a deafening roar, every dot ball a collective groan. The stadium lights cast a golden glow over the tense faces of the Australian fielders, while the Indian supporters, a sea of blue, wave their flags furiously, chanting 'India! India!' The air is thick with anticipation - will India pull off this incredible chase, or will Australia snatch victory? The next 12 balls will decide it all!

instruction: Aapko translate karna hai yeh English sentence Hinglish (Roman) mein jo ki Indian festival par hai: 'The festival of lights, Diwali, is celebrated with great fervor in India.'
output: Prakash ka tyohar, Diwali, bharat mein bahut hoshyaar se manaaya jaata hai.

instruction: A student scored 85%, 90%, and 78% in their Math, Science, and English exams respectively. If the passing mark for each subject is 60%, determine whether the student has passed all subjects and provide the percentage points by which they have passed or failed each subject.
output: The student has passed all subjects. Passing margins: Math (+25%), Science (+30%), English (+18%).

instruction: Act as a healthcare policy consultant for the Indian government. Brainstorm a list of 5 innovative yet feasible solutions to improve rural healthcare access in India, considering the country's diverse demographic and economic landscape.
output: Telemed Outreach Hubs, Community Health Worker (CHW) Upskilling, Public-Private Partnership (PPP) Mobile Clinics, Subsidized Telemedicine Platforms, and Incentivized Doctor Rotation Programs

instruction: Write a Hinglish sentence describing a scenario where a Bollywood actor, say 'Rahul', is excited about his new film's trailer release, using the verb 'dikhai dena' (to appear/show) and including the English phrase 'social media'?
output: Rahul ka kehna hai, 'Meri nayi film ka trailer aaj social media par dikhai denge aur main bohot excited hoon!'

instruction: मुझे एक लेख दें जिसमें 2022 में आर्टिफ़िशियल इंटेलिजेंस (एआई) के क्षेत्र में हुए प्रमुख विकासों का विवरण हो। फिर मुझे इसका 150 शब्दों में संक्षेप बताएं।
output: 2022 में आर्टिफ़िशियल इंटेलिजेंस में कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता मॉडलों की सटीकता में वृद्धि हुई, मेटावर्स के साथ एकीकरण बढ़ा, स्वास्थ्य सेवाओं में इसका उपयोग व्यापक हुआ, और एथिक एआई पर जोर दिया गया।

instruction: Unsere Startup-Idee ist, ein Online-Marktplatz für handgefertigte Produkte aus ländlichen Indien zu erstellen. Kategorisieren Sie diese Idee unter einer der folgenden Kategorien: 'Ungewöhnlich aber potenzialreich', 'Sehr wettbewerbsintensiv', 'Nachhaltigkeit betonend' oder 'Keine eindeutige Nische'
output: Nachhaltigkeit betonend

instruction: डेटा साइंस के संदर्भ में, एक वाक्य बनाएं जहाँ 'पैटर्न पहचान' (pattern recognition) का उपयोग कर रहे हों और उसके हिंदी में अनुवाद के साथ साथ उसका सही व्याकरणिक रूप भी बताएं।
output: पैटर्न पहचान (Pattern Recognition) का उपयोग डेटा सेट में छिपे मूल्यों को उजागर करने के लिए किया जाता है।

instruction: Translate the following machine learning concept from English to Hindi (Devanagari script): 'The new neural network model achieved state-of-the-art performance on the image classification task.'
output: न्यूरल नेटवर्क के नए मॉडल ने इमेज क्लासिफिकेशन टास्क पर स्टेट-ऑफ-द-आर्ट परफॉर्मेंस हासिल की।

instruction: Summarize the following article excerpt into a single paragraph (around 100-120 words), focusing on the key developments and implications for the future of work: [Article Excerpt Begins] Recent breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have led to the development of autonomous systems that can learn and adapt at unprecedented rates. Experts predict these advancements will significantly alter the job market by 2030, with an estimated 30% of routine tasks being fully automated. While this shift is expected to create new, high-skilled job opportunities in AI development and ethics, there are concerns about the widening skill gap and the need for comprehensive reskilling programs for workers in at-risk sectors. [Article Excerpt Ends]
output: Breakthroughs in AI have enabled the creation of highly adaptive autonomous systems, poised to automate 30% of routine tasks by 2030, transforming the job market. Though new AI-related jobs will emerge, concerns rise over a looming skill gap, highlighting the urgent need for widespread reskilling initiatives to support workers in vulnerable sectors, ensuring a smoother transition into an AI-driven future.

instruction: Aapko apne company ke liye ek remote work policy banaana hai. Ismein mention karna hai ki kis din kaam se pehle/vaake team meeting hoga, kaam ke ghante kya honge, aur kis software ka upyog communication ke liye hoga.
output:
Remote Work Policy for XYZ Inc.

1. **Mandatory Sync-Ups**: Daily Stand-up at 10:00 AM IST via Zoom.
2. **Work Hours**: Flexible, but must cover 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM IST core hours.
3. **Communication Tools**:
   - Slack for chats & file sharing
   - Trello for task management
   - Zoom for video meetings

instruction: भारत की अर्थव्यवस्था से संबंधित निम्नलिखित समाचार लेख के आधार पर यह निर्धारित करें कि यह लेख अर्थव्यवस्था के किस दृष्टिकोण से संबंधित है: विकास दर, रोजगार, मुद्रा मूल्य, या कृषि।
output: विकास दर

instruction: Correct the grammatical errors in the following sentence about Bollywood: 'The movie have been released last Friday and already break all box office record.'
output: The movie has been released last Friday and has already broken all box office records.

instruction: Mujhe bataye, cloud computing mein IaaS, PaaS, aur SaaS ke beech key kya ant hain? Apne jawab mein thoda nischit karke bataiye ki kab kab use karte hain.
output: IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) mein hardware aur storage milta hai, jaise AWS EC2. PaaS (Platform as a Service) mein development tools bhi milte hain, jaise Google App Engine. SaaS (Software as a Service) mein direct software access milta hai, jaise Salesforce. IaaS ko use karte hain jab customization chahiye, PaaS ko agile development ke liye, aur SaaS ko ready-to-use apps ke liye.

instruction: Translate the English sentence 'Diwali is celebrated with great fervour across India' into Hinglish (Roman script) for a social media post targeting Indian youth.
output: Diwali bharteeyon ke dwaara apne apne parivaar ke saath bahut hi manayi jaati hai

instruction: Write a dramatic one-liner describing the moment when a batsman hits a six off the last ball to win the match.
output: As the crowd erupted, Rohan's bat soared in triumph, the ball disappearing over the boundary for a decisive six, sealing the championship in the most heart-stopping finale of the season.

instruction: Aapko ek naya NGO shuru karna hai jo climate change ke liye jaagrukta badhane ka kaam kare. 5 innovative ideas lekhte hain jo aap apne NGO ke liye upyog kar sakte hain.
output: Hum apne NGO mein climate change ke baare mein jaagrukta badhane ke liye yeh 5 innovative ideas upyog kar sakte hain: 1. 'Eco-Warrior' Program: School aur college mein bachchon ko climate change ke bare mein padhao aur unhein micro-gardening ke liye inspire karo. 2. 'Plastic-Free Sundays' Campaign: Har Sunday ko logon ko plastic ka upyog nahi karna aur sustainable alternatives upyog karna. 3. 'Carbon Footprint Calculator' App: Ek app banayein jo logon ko apne daily activities ke carbon footprint ko track karne ki anaadi de. 4. 'Eco-Art Exhibitions' Organize: Local artists se mil kar climate change par banayi gayi art exhibitions organize karo, jo logon ko visually impact kare. 5. 'Community Green Drives' Weekends: Har weekend mein alag-alag areas mein tree plantation aur park clean-up events aayojit karo.

instruction: Act as a healthcare consultant tasked with identifying key challenges and innovative solutions for the Indian healthcare system. Brainstorm a list of 5 major concerns and 3 potential tech-driven solutions in bullet points, focusing on accessibility and affordability for rural populations.
output: Major Concerns: Inequitable Access to Specialists, Shortage of Trained Doctors in Rural Areas, High Out-of-Pocket Expenses, Inadequate Health Infrastructure, Limited Awareness on Preventive Care. Solutions: Telemedicine Platforms for Virtual Consultations, AI-Powered Diagnostic Tools for Primary Care Centers, Blockchain for Secure & Accessible Medical Records.

instruction: एक विद्यार्थी के लिए शिक्षा के तीन सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पहलुओं की सूची बनाएं जो उनके भविष्य के करियर के लिए आवश्यक हैं।
output: शिक्षा के तीन सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पहलू जो एक विद्यार्थी के भविष्य के करियर के लिए आवश्यक हैं वे हैं: १. **नक्की ज्ञान** (विषय विशिष्ट ज्ञान), २. **सॉफ्ट स्किल्स** (संचार, टीमवर्क, समय प्रबंधन), और ३. **क्रिटिकल थिंकिंग एंड प्रोब्लम सॉल्विंग स्किल्स** (समस्या समाधान और विश्लेषणात्मक सोच)

instruction: Yeh article padhkar mujhe bataye ki kya hai 'AI aur Machine Learning ke beech ka antar' aur kis tarah se yeh doh technology humare daily life mein kaam aa rahe hain? (Article length: ~250 words)
output: AI aur Machine Learning alag concepts hain. AI machine ko intelligent banata hai, jabki Machine Learning AI ka ek subset hai jo data se seekhte hue decisions lene ki shakti deti hai. Daily life mein, AI virtual assistants (jaise Alexa) mein aur Machine Learning personalized recommendations (jaise Netflix) mein dikhayi deti hai.

instruction: Classify the following startup idea into one of the following categories: 'Sustainable Tech', 'E-commerce Innovation', 'Healthcare Disruptor', or 'Education Fintech' based on the brief description. Startup Idea: 'GreenCycle' - An AI-powered platform that helps households and small businesses recycle more efficiently by identifying recyclable materials from waste and scheduling doorstep pickups with local recycling facilities.
output: Sustainable Tech

instruction: Ye sentence ko correct karo: 'Data science ka use hum karte hai for prediction aur data analysis'. (Hinglish mein)
output: Data science ka use hum karte hain for prediction aur data analysis.

instruction: Explain the primary difference between 'IaaS' and 'PaaS' in cloud computing, considering a startup's scalability and cost-efficiency needs.
output: IaaS provides virtualized computing resources (servers, storage, networking) over the internet, giving users full control and management responsibility. PaaS delivers a complete platform for developing, running, and managing applications, without managing underlying infrastructure. For a scalability and cost-conscious startup, PaaS reduces operational overhead and costs, ideal for rapid development and deployment, whereas IaaS offers more flexibility but requires more operational effort.

instruction: मशीन लर्निंग के संदर्भ में 'न्यूरल नेटवर्क' की परिभाषा को हिंदी में अनुवाद करें (जैसे जानवरों के मस्तिष्क की कोशिकाओं के आधार पर)।
output: मशीन लर्निंग में न्यूरल नेटवर्क जानवरों के मस्तिष्क की कोशिकाओं (न्यूरों) के मॉडल पर आधारित एक विद्युत उपकरण है, जो डेटा के आधार पर सीखने और निर्णय लेने की क्षमता प्रदर्शित करता है।

instruction: Ek article ka headline hai: 'India's GDP growth to slow down to 6.5% in FY24, says World Bank'. Aapko yeh classify karna hai ki yeh headline kis category ke tahat aata hai: 'Positive', 'Negative', 'Neutral' ya 'Uncertain'. Aapki kya response hogi?
output: Uncertain

instruction:
Summarize the following article excerpt into a single paragraph of about 150-200 words, highlighting the key points, challenges, and future outlook mentioned regarding the integration of AI in healthcare: [INSERT ARTICLE EXCERPT BELOW]

(Article Excerpt) 'The incorporation of Artificial Intelligence in healthcare has shown promising results in diagnostics, with AI-powered systems accurately identifying diseases from imaging scans with higher speeds than human professionals. However, challenges persist, notably in data privacy concerns and the need for standardized regulatory frameworks globally. Despite these hurdles, forecasts suggest a significant rise in AI adoption across hospitals worldwide by 2025, aiming to enhance patient care quality and reduce operational costs. Researchers also warn about the potential job displacement of certain medical roles.'
output: AI in healthcare has improved diagnostic accuracy and speed, especially in image scanning. Key challenges include data privacy issues and the lack of global regulatory standards. Despite these, AI is expected to be widely adopted in hospitals by 2025 to improve patient care and reduce costs, though it may displace some medical jobs.

instruction: Correct the grammatical errors in the following sentence about Bollywood: 'Aamir Khan release his new movie last week in Mumbai.'
output: Aamir Khan released his new movie last week in Mumbai.

instruction: Aapka ek friend hai jo office se bore ho gaya hai aur ab remote work karna chahta hai. Usko ek motivational message likh kar batao ki remote work ke kya benefits hai (3-4 benefits) aur kis tarah se woh apne boss ko convince kar sakta hai?
output: Hey Friend! Office ke routine se bored toh hum sab hi hote hain. Remote work karne ka soch, toh absolutely right decision hai! See, benefits hain: 1. **Flexibility**: Apne routine ko khud control kar sakte hain. 2. **Less Distractions**: Office ki charchaon se door, zyada focus. 3. **Work-Life Balance**: Ghar wale kaam bhi easily manage ho jayenge. Ab boss ko convince karne ke liye, ek detailed proposal leke ja: - Apne previous projects mein kiya gaya good work highlight karo. - Remote work se productivity mein increase ke examples de (research karke). - Trial period ke liye agree ho ja, jo kiha hai unko prove karne ke liye. Best of Luck!

instruction: विराट कोहली के करियर के सर्वश्रेष्ठ क्रिकेट मैच की कल्पना करें और उसका एक अनौपचारिक, रोमांचक विवरण (लगभग 150-200 शब्द) लिखें।
output:
विराट कोहली का सर्वश्रेष्ठ मैच: एडन गार्डन, कोलकाता, 2016 एशिया कप फाइनल

यह मैच विराट कोहली के करियर का एक महान दिन था। एशिया कप का फाइनल भारत और बांग्लादेश के बीच था। विराट ने 49 गेंदों में 82* रन बनाकर भारत को जीत दिलाई। उनकी बैटिंग ने सबको आश्चर्य में डाल दिया। विराट ने कई छह रन बनाए और अपनी टीम को 8 विकेट से जीता दिलाई। यह मैच विराट के करियर का सबसे अच्छा मैच था क्योंकि उन्होंने दबाव में रहते हुए शानदार प्रदर्शन किया।

instruction: Translate the following sentence about an Indian festival into English (assuming the input is in Hindi): 'दिवाली के दौरान लोग अपने घरों को रंगोली और दीपावली के साथ सजाते हैं।'
output: During Diwali, people decorate their homes with rangoli and diyas.
